results.definition_en: Having much soft body, not thin.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 胖的、肥的;體型臃腫、非瘦削。
results.example_en: The cat is too fat to jump.

results.definition_en: Able to give much fruit, grain, or new life.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 肥沃的、多產的;能生產果實、穀物或新生命。
results.example_en: The fertile land gives much food.
results.example_zh_tw: 肥沃的土地能種出許多食物。

results.definition_en: Coming before all others in time or place.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 第一的、首先的;在時間或位置上居先。
results.example_en: She is first in line for the bus.

results.definition_en: Made not to move; stable.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 固定的;不會移動的、穩固的。
results.example_en: The picture is fixed to the wall.

results.definition_en: Smooth and even; not curved or angled.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 平的、平坦的;光滑均勻、無起伏。
results.example_en: Put the paper on a flat surface.

results.definition_en: Not held back; able to do as one wishes.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 自由的;不受束縛、可隨意而行。
results.example_en: The bird is free in the sky.
results.example_zh_tw: 那隻鳥在天空自由飛翔。

results.definition_en: Happening often.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 頻繁的、經常的;發生頻率高的。
results.example_en: She is a frequent visitor to the library.

results.definition_en: Holding as much as it can; with no more room.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 滿的、充足的;容量已盡、無餘地。
results.example_en: The cup is full of milk.

results.definition_en: True for most things, not just one.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 一般的、普遍的;適用於多數事物的。
results.example_en: There is a general feeling of happiness.

results.definition_en: Right or pleasing; of high quality.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 好的、優良的;正確、令人滿意或品質高的。
results.example_en: She is a good friend to me.

results.definition_en: Very big; or very important.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 偉大的、巨大的;規模大或地位重要。
results.example_en: It was a great day for our family.
results.example_zh_tw: 那是我們家很重要的一天。

results.definition_en: Of the colour between white and black.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 灰色的;介於白與黑之間。
results.example_en: She wore a grey coat in the rain.
results.example_zh_tw: 她在雨中穿著灰色外套。

results.definition_en: Held up from above; not on the ground.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 懸掛的、垂掛的;由上方吊起、未著地。
results.example_en: The pictures are hanging on the wall.

results.definition_en: Having a good feeling of pleasure.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 快樂的、開心的;心情愉悅。
results.example_en: She was happy to see her friend.

results.definition_en: Not soft; or not easy to do.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 硬的、難的;不柔軟或不容易完成。
results.example_en: The seat is too hard for sitting long.
results.example_zh_tw: 這座位太硬，坐久不舒服。

results.definition_en: In good condition, with no disease.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 健康的;身體良好、無疾病。
results.example_en: Eat fresh fruit to stay healthy.
results.example_zh_tw: 多吃新鮮水果保持健康。

results.definition_en: Far up from the ground.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 高的;距地面遠的。
results.example_en: The bird sat on a high branch.

results.definition_en: Empty inside; not solid.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 空心的、中空的;內部為空、非實心。
results.example_en: The drum is hollow inside.

results.definition_en: Of great worth or weight; needing care.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 重要的;有重大價值或意義的。
results.example_en: She has an important meeting at noon.
results.example_zh_tw: 她中午有一場重要會議。

results.definition_en: Doing good or having a soft heart for others.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 親切的、和藹的;心懷善意對待他人。
results.example_en: She is kind to all the dogs.
results.example_zh_tw: 她對所有的狗都很溫柔。

results.definition_en: The same as, or near to, another thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 相像的;與他物相同或相近。
results.example_en: She has a face like her mother's.

results.definition_en: Having life; not dead.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 活著的;有生命、非死亡的。
results.example_en: Every living thing needs water.

results.definition_en: Of great measure from end to end.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 長的;從一端到另一端距離大的。
results.example_en: The road is long and straight.

results.definition_en: Of the sex that does not give birth; like a man or a boy.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 男性的、雄性的;不能生育、屬男方一性。
results.example_en: The male bird has bright colours.

results.definition_en: Joined as husband and wife.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 已婚的;結為夫妻的。
results.example_en: They were married two years ago.
